testsuite.name: com.cognizant.testscripts.TC021_UploadedImageCount
testsuite.system-out: Successfully Launched Chrome Browser Browser window is maximized successfully Known defect observed for rent -1. Actual message is not expected/user-friendly. Actual: Please fill all required (*) fields. Known defect observed for rent 9999999999. Actual message is not expected/user-friendly. Actual: could not execute statement [Data truncation: Out of range value for column 'rent_amount' at row 1] [insert into postings (available_beds,created_at,expires_at,food_rating,food_review,locality_and_landmark,needs_reconfirmation,office_campus,pg_name,posted_by_user_id,reminder_sent,rent_amount,service_rating,service_review,sharing_type,status,tenant_preference,total_beds) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into postings (available_beds,created_at,expires_at,food_rating,food_review,locality_and_landmark,needs_reconfirmation,office_campus,pg_name,posted_by_user_id,reminder_sent,rent_amount,service_rating,service_review,sharing_type,status,tenant_preference,total_beds) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]
